description_long: This is a vintage, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, reminiscent of World War II fighter aircraft such as the Supermarine Spitfire. The body is primarily dark brown with subtle weathering and insignia details, and the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy situated just ahead of the wing's trailing edge. The wings are low-mounted and straight, with rounded tips and no visible winglets. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and non-retractable.
description: A vintage, single-propeller airplane with elliptical low-mounted wings, a streamlined dark brown fuselage, and a classic taildragger landing gear. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned just behind the wing's midpoint.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, single propeller, and narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit, and weathered markings on the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with rounded tips and no winglets; slight dihedral angle visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just behind the wing's midpoint.
